closureReason: V26 total closure is explicit end-to-end: prior gate acceptance holds, prompt-space and whole-repository proofs close, the spec family is promoted, and product/reform evidence no longer depends on interpretive notes.

closureRows.criterion: Fifth-, sixth-, and seventh-gate acceptance must hold before final V26 closure.
Prompt-space completeness must carry an explicit final closure verdict.
Whole-repository production satisfaction must close across application, API, MCP, ChatGPT App, package, proof, and reform corridors.
The V26 spec family and canonical input reports must pass in final promoted posture.
The kept repository must be application-ready Bitcode canon without silent legacy product ownership.
V26 total closure must be explicit enough that promotion no longer depends on interpretive notes.

checks.label: V26 total closure is specified, parity-recorded, and proof-surface mapped

requiredEvidence.evidence: The current generated eighth-gate evidence includes explicit closure verdicts
requiredEvidence.description: main spec records the current eighth-gate closure evidence

requiredEvidence.evidence: eighth-gate whole-repository closure is explicit and closed
requiredEvidence.description: parity matrix records closed final-gate repository closure

requiredEvidence.evidence: V26 is now fully proven Bitcode canon
requiredEvidence.description: delta records the shift from through-seventh checkpoint to full V26 closure

requiredEvidence.evidence: generated V26 proof appendix and reports are eighth-gate final closure evidence
requiredEvidence.description: proof-surface map treats final reports as closure evidence rather than blockers
